title: AnsibleAssetComponent
description: Run an Ansible playbook as a Dagster asset to provision or configure infrastructure as a pipeline-first step.

asset_name.description: Dagster asset key for this component.

playbook.description: Path to the Ansible playbook YAML file.

inventory.description: Inventory file path, directory, or comma-separated host list (e.g. 'host1,host2,'). When null, ansible-playbook uses the inventory from ansible.cfg.

extra_vars_file.description: Path to a vars file passed as --extra-vars @<file>.

tags.description: Limit execution to tasks with these Ansible tags (--tags).

skip_tags.description: Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (--skip-tags).

limit.description: Further limit the hosts targeted by this play (--limit).

become_user.description: User to become when privilege escalation is active (--become-user).

vault_password_file.description: Path to a file containing the Ansible Vault password (--vault-password-file).

vault_password_env_var.description: Name of an environment variable whose value is the Vault password. Written to a secure temp file and passed as --vault-password-file.

ssh_private_key_env_var.description: Name of an environment variable containing an SSH private key (PEM). Written to a 0600 temp file; sets ANSIBLE_PRIVATE_KEY_FILE.

check_mode.description: Run in check (dry-run) mode — no changes are applied (--check).

diff_mode.description: Show diffs for files that would be changed (--diff).

working_dir.description: Working directory for the subprocess. Defaults to the current process cwd.

env_vars.description: Additional environment variables merged into the subprocess environment.

description.description: Human-readable description surfaced in the Dagster UI.

deps.description: Upstream asset keys this asset depends on.
